topic: Elon Musk to Owe Billions After Jury Finds He Misled Twitter.

framework.structure: [Number] + [Category of Thing] + ['that feel illegal to know']
framework.trigger: Information asymmetry — viewer gains restricted knowledge others don't have
framework.example: 4 websites that feel illegal to know about in 2026.

script.hook: 4 websites that feel illegal to know about in 2026.
script.body: Most people scroll past these tools every day without realising they exist. Once you know about them, you cannot un-know them.
script.cta: Follow to see the ones they don't want you to find.

full_script_text: 4 websites that feel illegal to know about in 2026. <break time="0.8s"/> Most people scroll past these tools every day without realising they exist. Once you know about them, you cannot un-know them. Follow to see the ones they don't want you to find.

visual_direction.kling_prompt: dark glowing computer screens with code, futuristic AI interface, neon blue and green, no faces, 9:16 vertical cinematic, cyberpunk, high contrast
